name: Everpure, Inc.
summary: Everpure, Inc. (formerly Pure Storage) is a global technology company providing an integrated storage and data management platform. The company offers flash-based storage systems, the Everpure Platform for unified data management across on-premises, hybrid, and public cloud environments, Portworx for Kubernetes/container storage, and Evergreen//One storage-as-a-service subscription. It serves enterprise and hyperscale customers, supporting AI workloads, cloud-native applications, and modern data infrastructure modernization using DirectFlash and QLC flash technology.

products.name: Everpure Platform
products.description: Unified storage and data management platform virtualizing data across on-premises, hybrid, public cloud, and edge environments.

products.name: Everpure Fusion
products.description: Next-generation software virtualizing storage and data management into a unified cloud-like experience across on-premises, cloud, and hosted environments.

products.name: Evergreen//One
products.description: Outcome-based storage-as-a-service subscription offering SLAs across capacity, performance, efficiency, availability, and durability.

products.name: Portworx
products.description: Enterprise Kubernetes/container data platform providing primary container storage, backup, disaster recovery, and migration.

products.name: DirectFlash Module (DFM)
products.description: Integrated flash hardware modules, including 300TB DFM, enabling direct-to-NAND flash management with high density and efficiency.

products.name: Everpure Cloud
products.description: Cloud services available on Azure and AWS enabling hybrid-cloud operationalization for traditional and cloud-native applications.

products.name: Enterprise Data Cloud (EDC)
products.description: Architectural approach for centrally managing virtualized cloud of data with unified control spanning on-premises and public cloud.

partnerships.description: Everpure Cloud services available on Azure to support hybrid-cloud environments.
Everpure Cloud services available on AWS to support hybrid-cloud environments.
Collaboration with key QLC flash partners to advance the density roadmap for DirectFlash modules.
Pending acquisition of 1touch referenced in forward-looking statements.
